items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork Tray
items.description: Slow-smoked pork shoulder, hand-pulled and tossed in our tangy house BBQ sauce. Serves 12.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Tray
items.description: Herb-marinated chicken breasts, grilled and sliced. Tender, flavorful, and perfect for any crowd.

items.name: Smoked Beef Brisket Tray
items.description: Texas-style brisket smoked low and slow for 12 hours. Rich bark with melt-in-your-mouth tenderness.

items.name: Italian Meatball Tray
items.description: House-made beef and pork meatballs simmered in marinara. Classic Italian comfort food for your event.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Fajita Tray
items.description: Sautéed peppers, onions, and seasonal vegetables with warm tortillas and fresh pico de gallo.

items.name: Creamy Mac & Cheese
items.description: Three-cheese blend baked golden and creamy. A crowd-pleasing favorite at every gathering.

items.name: Fresh Garden Salad
items.description: Crisp mixed greens with cucumber, tomato, and our house vinaigrette. Light and refreshing.

items.name: Classic Coleslaw
items.description: Creamy cabbage slaw with a touch of sweetness. The perfect cool complement to BBQ mains.

items.name: Roasted Seasonal Vegetables
items.description: Seasonal vegetables roasted with olive oil, garlic, and fresh herbs until caramelized.

items.name: Honey Cornbread Basket
items.description: Warm honey-sweet cornbread muffins, baked fresh and served in a rustic basket.

items.name: Slow-Cooked Baked Beans
items.description: Sweet and smoky beans slow-baked with bacon and molasses. A Southern BBQ classic.

items.name: Classic Potato Salad
items.description: Classic creamy potato salad with celery, egg, and a touch of mustard. Made fresh daily.

items.name: Deli Sandwich Platter
items.description: Assorted deli sandwiches on artisan rolls — turkey, ham, roast beef, and veggie options.

items.name: Veggie Wrap Platter
items.description: Colorful veggie wraps with hummus, roasted peppers, and fresh greens in spinach tortillas.

items.name: Chicken Caesar Wrap Platter
items.description: Grilled chicken, romaine, parmesan, and Caesar dressing wrapped in flour tortillas.

items.name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
items.description: Warm, creamy spinach and artichoke dip served with toasted baguette slices and chips.

items.name: Chicken Wing Platter
items.description: Crispy jumbo wings tossed in your choice of buffalo, BBQ, or honey garlic sauce.

items.name: Mini Meatball Bites
items.description: Bite-sized Italian meatballs in marinara, perfect for passing trays and cocktail hours.

items.name: Fresh Veggie Platter
items.description: Crisp seasonal vegetables with ranch and hummus dips. Fresh, colorful, and always a hit.

items.name: Artisan Cheese Board
items.description: Curated selection of artisan cheeses with crackers, grapes, and honey comb.

items.name: Chocolate Brownie Tray
items.description: Fudgy chocolate brownies cut into generous squares. Rich, decadent, and always the first to go.

items.name: Assorted Cookie Platter
items.description: Fresh-baked chocolate chip, oatmeal raisin, and sugar cookies. Assorted for every taste.

items.name: Mini Cheesecakes
items.description: Individual New York-style cheesecakes with graham cracker crust and berry topping.

items.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
items.description: Seasonal fruit artfully arranged — berries, melon, grapes, and tropical favorites.

items.name: Fresh Lemonade (Gallon)
items.description: Fresh-squeezed lemonade brewed daily. Bright, tart, and refreshing by the gallon.

items.name: Sweet Tea (Gallon)
items.description: Southern-style sweet tea brewed fresh. A classic addition to any catering spread.

items.name: Bottled Water Case
items.description: Chilled bottled water — convenient hydration for events, meetings, and outdoor gatherings.
